title: The World: High Voltage (JCraft Addon)
description: Adds The World: High Voltage (TWHV/TWAU) as a new stand to JCraft 0.18.0+ (JOJO, JJBA)
body:
Adds The World: High Voltage (TWHV/TWAU) as a new stand to JCraft 0.18.0+


This adds an entire new stand to JCraft with custom abilities! He doesn't replace ANY stands and he is an addition to your JCraft!



This REQUIRES JCraft Additions 1.0.0 or above!



The World: High Voltage is Steel Ball Run's version of The World. My iteration of him turns him into a long-range focused Stand. At close range, TWHV puts you at a slight disadvantage. 



The World: High Voltage is obtained by using a "Presidental Badge" on Shadow The World. The Presidental Badge is crafted with a revolver, so you will need D4C, and quickly have to craft the badge after obtaining D4C's revolver (Crouch + Special 2). 



Use "/stand about" to view all of TWHV's abilities.



If you have questions about this mod, MESSAGE ME! The JCraft Devs did not make this mod so they will not be able to help you.
